basics.name: Alex Chen
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Data Platform Specialist
basics.summary: Senior Software Engineer with 4+ years building scalable data infrastructure and real-time streaming systems. Proven expertise designing event-driven architectures, Kafka/Flink pipelines processing millions of events daily, and mentoring high-performing teams. Open-source contributor with deep full-stack capabilities.

work.name: Acme Corp
highlights: Built and scaled real-time data pipeline processing 2M events/day using Kafka and Apache Flink, powering personalization features that increased user engagement by 25%.
Led migration of monolithic API to event-driven microservices architecture, reducing p99 latency by 40% and enabling independent team deployments.
Mentored 3 junior engineers through structured pairing sessions, all promoted within 12 months.

work.name: DataFlow Startup
highlights: Designed and shipped core analytics dashboard serving 500+ enterprise customers with weekly customer feedback iteration.
Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions reducing deploy time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes with automated rollback on failure.
Built OAuth2/OIDC integration supporting 5 identity providers, enabling enterprise SSO adoption.

projects.name: ML Model Monitor
projects.description: Open-source real-time ML model drift detection and monitoring dashboard with configurable alerting.
highlights: Built real-time model drift detection system with configurable alerting thresholds, deployed on AWS Lambda for zero-ops monitoring.
Designed React dashboard visualizing prediction distributions, feature importance, and alert history across multiple model versions.

projects.name: DevCLI Toolkit
projects.description: High-performance Rust-based CLI toolkit for developer productivity workflows with sub-5ms startup time.
highlights: Created Rust-based CLI toolkit with sub-5ms startup time for common developer workflows: git branch cleanup, log tailing, and config management.
Published to crates.io with 2,000+ downloads; maintained backward compatibility across 8 minor releases.

volunteer.summary: Led a team of 8 volunteers building civic tech tools for local nonprofits, delivering 3 projects in 12 months.
